world.title: ‘Beginning of the end?’ Oil price falls raise hope of relief at the pump
world.description: Immediately after United States President Donald Trump’s ceasefire announcement, the cost of Brent oil, the global benchmark, plunged more than 15 per cent to below $US91 ($130) a barrel, while US-traded West Texas Intermediate was more than 16 per cent lower.

world.title: Polls suggest Trump still shielding Labor as right-wing vote drops
world.description: The government is yet to see any major backlash in the polls over the fuel crisis, with most voters blaming Donald Trump instead.

business.title: Assessing Savara (SVRA) Valuation After Accelerated Review Progress For MOLBREEVI
business.description:
Regulatory milestones in focus for Savara stock
Savara (SVRA) is back on investors’ radar after the U.K. regulator accepted the Marketing Authorisation Application for MOLBREEVI under Accelerated Review, alongside ongoing priority reviews in the U.S. and Europe.
See our latest analysis for Savara.
The recent string of regulatory updates appears to be feeding into share price momentum, with a 1-month share price return of 9.68% and a 1-year total shareholder return of 122.31% from a last close...

business.title: Water storage feud heats up as frustrated Central Queensland farmers take on corporate giants
business.description: Central Queensland irrigators are demanding a "fair go" from two mega water users that are pumping from a ratepayer-owned storage without paying anything for its multimillion-dollar costs.

business.title: Eterna grows 2025 profit by 53%
business.description: Eterna Plc reports a significant 52.9% year-on-year profit increase for 2025, reaching N7.27bn. The board proposes a dividend of N0.50 per share.

business.title: Albanese welcomes Iran ceasefire as global oil prices tumble
business.description: Immediately after United States President Donald Trump’s ceasefire announcement, the cost of Brent oil, the global benchmark, plunged more than 15 per cent to below $US91 ($130) a barrel, while US-traded West Texas Intermediate was more than 16 per cent lower.

business.title: Gold extends gains as Trump pauses Iran attacks for two weeks
business.description: Gold, which started the year on a strong note, has fallen more than 8 per cent since the Iran war began on Feb 28.

science.title: Bacteria that's new to science found inside beached sperm whales
science.description: Previously unseen bacteria have been discovered inside beached pygmy sperm whales, baffling scientists due to their potential impact.

science.title: New metamaterials learn shapes and move without central control
science.description: Scientists create metamaterials that learn shapes, adapt behavior, and move without central control like living systems.

science.title: Jupiter’s Strong Magnetic Field May Explain Why It Has So Many Large Moons
science.description: New simulations suggest Jupiter’s powerful magnetism carved a gap in its early disk, helping capture and preserve major moons like Io and Ganymede, while Saturn’s weaker field left its system sparsely populated.

science.title: Earthrise to Earthset: How the planet's climate has changed since the photo that inspired the environmental movement
science.description: A new Earthset image has been captured by the crew of Artemis II, 58 years since the iconic Earthrise photograph taken by the crew of Apollo 8. Over these past six decades, the climate has changed dramatically.

science.title: Scans Reveal Oldest Octopus Fossil Misidentified
science.description: A famous 300-million-year-old fossil that was thought to be the world's oldest octopus – even featuring in the Guinness Book of Records – has turned

science.title: 'Screams of delight': Artemis crew flying home to thrilled NASA scientists
science.description: Of note was their stunning shot of an Earthset, the moment when Earth drops below the rugged lunar horizon.

science.title: Light-driven method enables sustainable production of porous semiconducting polymers
science.description: Researchers at Koç University have developed a light-driven method to produce porous semiconducting polymers under ambient conditions without the need for metal catalysts. The study, led by Prof. Dr. Önder Metin from the Department of Chemistry, in collaboration with Dr. Melek Sermin Özer, Dr. Zafer Eroğlu, and Prof. Dr. Sermet Koyuncu, was published in Nature Communications.

science.title: 'Oldest octopus' fossil is no octopus at all, scans reveal
science.description: A famous 300-million-year-old fossil that was thought to be the world's oldest octopus—even featuring in the Guinness Book of Records—has turned out to be something else altogether. In what amounts to a case of mistaken identity, the fossil hid its true nature through decay 300 million years ago, before being fossilized.

ai.title: AI is pushing older workers toward upskilling as job insecurity grows
ai.description: Older workers are turning to AI training as job insecurity rises and traditional roles evolve.

ai.title: Timekettle Debuts at GITEX Asia 2026 with Award-Winning W4 AI Interpreter Earbuds
ai.description: SINGAPORE, April 8, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Global AI communication company Timekettle will make its debut at GITEX Asia 2026, held at Marina Bay Sands from April 9 to 10, showcasing its latest innovation - the W4 AI Interpreter Earbuds, recently recognized with the iF Design Award for product design excellence.

ai.title: 20th Beijing InfoComm China 2026 Takes Place Next Week with Top Technology Line-up
ai.description: BEIJING, April 8, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The 20th Beijing InfoComm China will open its doors next week 15-17 April 2026 at the China National Convention Center (CNCC), marking the beginning of a landmark era: the 20th year of the InfoComm China brand, followed by the 20th edition of the tradeshow in 2027. This year's event makes significant strides with internationalizing the event through its international and invited guest programs, promotion of 100+ export-ready exhibitors, and alignment with China's 15th Five-Year Plan with conference content topics and Pro AV technology surrounding the future of AI, collaborative environments, and IoT ecosystems.

ai.title: OneQode, Hitachi Vantara & Cylix Form Strategic Alliance to Launch Sovereign AI Factory Initiative
ai.description: Multimillion-dollar alliance to deploy sovereign-ready AI infrastructure across key global markets, with Australia, Japan, Malaysia and Singapore among the first

ai.title: AI roles surge across India’s top IT firms as automation reshapes growth
ai.description: This shift is already visible in the pace of leadership changes. At least five of the country’s top 10 IT firms—including Tata Consultancy Services, Infosys, Wipro, LTM, and Persistent Systems—introduced or expanded AI-focused roles over the past year, more than in the previous two years combined.

ai.title: New research institute to ramp up efforts as Hong Kong pursues ‘AI for all’
ai.description: Artificial Intelligence Research and Development Institute’s first meeting will be held as early as this month to formulate city’s AI road map.

ai.title: Accounting tech startup Atlas raises $6 million in round co
ai.description: The company will use the fresh funds to expand its AI platform, grow its network of partner accounting firms, and accelerate go-to-market efforts. Per cofounder and CEO Arpit Maheshwari, the startup focusses on embedding AI across accounting workflows, with early deployments having delivered over fivefold efficiency gains in targeted workflows.

ai.title: Indian startups productive with AI, but revenue impact yet to be seen: Report
ai.description: Per the report titled The State of AI Adoption in Indian Startups, 2026, prepared by VC firm Elevation Capital, about 86% of founders plan to increase their AI budgets in 2026, 53% to more than double their spend, while only 4% plan to decrease investment. About 83% report being more excited about AI than they were 12 months ago.
